summary: Outstanding new Schoeps transfer delivers crystal-clear soundboard quality, though no performance details are provided.
review: The reviewer notes that this FLAC is a fresh transfer of the same Schoeps front‑of‑house source used for shnid=9402 and praises its outstanding audio fidelity. While the recording sounds superb, there’s no information on how the band performed that night.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on excellent recording quality; no data on show performance, so rating reflects strong audio but limited overall insight.

recording_quality.technical_notes: New transfer of the Schoeps FOB source; clarity and detail described as outstanding.
